text: K&l simple Queue Service (SQ5) @ Qoo ¢ Public, Fully Managed, Highly-Available Queues - Standard or FIFO * Messages up to 256KB in size - link to large data * Received messages are hidden (VisibilityTimeout) e .. then either reappear (retry) or are explicitly deleted e Dead-Letter queues can be used for problem messages * ASGs can scale and Lambdas invoke based on queue length
